subject: Increase initialDelay and timeout for gizmo pod
commit_message:
Increase initialDelay and timeout for gizmo pod

Change-Id: If9c441897103ef93b870be7b548805d9ecaceb44
Issue-ID: AAI-2139
Signed-off-by: Yang Xu <yang.xu3@huawei.com>

entries.message:

Gitlab Orange: Starting Chained-CI build

Patch Set 1:
